% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\usepackage{quiver}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}[ampersand replacement=\&]
	\&\& {\Sigma_0 \times I} \&\& \\
	{\Sigma_0} \&\&\&\& {\Sigma_1} \\
	\&\& {\Sigma_1\times I}
	\arrow["\eta", dashed, from=1-3, to=3-3]
	\arrow["{(\mathrm{id}_{\Sigma_0},0)}", hook, from=2-1, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{(\phi_1,0)}"', hook', from=2-1, to=3-3]
	\arrow["{(\phi_0^{-1},1)}"', hook', from=2-5, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{(\mathrm{id}_{\Sigma_1},1)}", hook, from=2-5, to=3-3]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
